dct:conformsTo: http://mlcommons.org/croissant/1.0 (descriptive; full loader conformance with the DOI deposit -- see description)
name: leakage-controlled-benchmark-multi-source-stock-prediction
description: Protocol-locked benchmark for multi-source next-day stock prediction: availability-timed derived feature datasets for five source families (price technical indicators, news sentiment statistics, social media day-level aggregates, publication-lagged macroeconomic series, public sector graphs) over 55 liquid US large-caps, feature rows 2016-01-04 to 2023-12-28 (prices from 2015-01-02 warm up the indicators), with five expanding chronological folds, a tuned price-only reference baseline, naive/classical anchors, and reference results from 2,468 runs (2,151 controlled). Raw third-party text and proprietary classifications are not redistributed (see DATA-STATEMENTS.md). NOTE: full Croissant 1.0 loader conformance (official context, per-field source mappings, checksums) lands with the DOI feature deposit on acceptance; until then this record is descriptive metadata.

distribution.name: results
distribution.description: Committed reference results (CSV): direction/volatility grids, leakage-free macro re-runs, harness-native single-state reference cells, sector-graph equivalence arms, naive anchors, audit diagnostics.

distribution.name: macro-raw
distribution.description: Public-domain FRED federal series (business-day resampled, original and publication-lag-corrected) + FOMC dates.

distribution.name: derived-features
distribution.description: Per-stock-day derived feature tables for the five source families. NOT materialized in this repository: DOI-archived deposit on acceptance; until then regenerate via the scripts in this repository (see DATA-STATEMENTS.md for per-source terms and regeneration).

recordSet.name: stock-days
recordSet.description: ~111k per-stock-day rows (55 tickers x 2,011 feature days, 2016-01-04 to 2023-12-28; prices fetched from 2015-01-02 warm up the trailing indicators); primary label = next-day direction under a symmetric 0.5% dead-zone applied to train/validation/test alike; secondary label = next-day realized volatility; five expanding chronological folds with July-to-June test windows from 2019-07-01 to 2023-12-31 (the last a six-month stub).

field.name: news_features
field.description: 11 FinBERT sentiment statistics, T-1 aligned, 52/55 names covered

field.name: social_features
field.description: 17 StockTwits day-level aggregates + has-data flag; coverage ends 2022-12-30

field.name: macro_features
field.description: 5 federal series at publication dates + FOMC flag
